title: Route Optimization Engine
description: The engine automatically calculates optimal buy/sell locations for the player's route. Given the goods available at each city and current prices, determine the best trades to make along the route.
definition-of-done: Optimization engine calculates best buy/sell decisions. Engine considers prices, capacity, and route order. Results displayed to player before turn execution.
testing-plan: Verify optimization produces profitable routes. Test with various price configurations. Verify capacity constraints respected.
unknowns: How much player can override optimization
